query:
-- ── GAME 1: PIT @ NYM (id=2250007) ──────────────────────────────────────────
-- Model: PIT proj 3.14 runs, NYM proj 4.00 runs
-- PIT -1.5 run line: model says NYM covers 80.4% → PIT RL odds +411 / NYM RL odds -411
-- ML: PIT +161 / NYM -161
-- Total 7.0: Over +106 / Under -106
-- spreadDiff: book PIT -1.5 at +161 (38.3% imp) vs model +411 (19.6% imp) → edge on NYM +1.5
-- book NYM +1.5 at -197 (66.3% imp) vs model -411 (80.4% imp) → diff = 14.1pp edge NYM
-- totalDiff: book over -122 (54.9% imp) vs model +106 (48.6% imp) → diff = -6.3pp (fade over)
UPDATE games SET
  awayModelSpread      = '-1.5',
  homeModelSpread      = '+1.5',
  modelAwaySpreadOdds  = '+411',
  modelHomeSpreadOdds  = '-411',
  modelAwayPLOdds      = '+411',
  modelHomePLOdds      = '-411',
  modelTotal           = '7.0',
  modelOverOdds        = '+106',
  modelUnderOdds       = '-106',
  modelAwayML          = '+161',
  modelHomeML          = '-161',
  modelAwayScore       = '3.14',
  modelHomeScore       = '4.00',
  modelOverRate        = '48.58',
  modelUnderRate       = '51.42',
  modelAwayWinPct      = '38.34',
  modelHomeWinPct      = '61.66',
  spreadDiff           = '14.1',
  totalDiff            = '-6.3',
  modelRunAt           = UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000,
  publishedModel       = 1
WHERE id = 2250007;

-- ── GAME 2: CWS @ MIL (id=2250008) ──────────────────────────────────────────
-- Model: CWS proj 3.17 runs, MIL proj 4.85 runs
-- CWS +1.5 run line: model says CWS covers 48.7% → CWS RL odds +105 / MIL RL odds -105
-- ML: CWS +241 / MIL -241
-- Total 8.0: Over +113 / Under -113
-- spreadDiff: book MIL -1.5 at +113 (46.9% imp) vs model -105 (51.2% imp) → diff = 4.3pp edge MIL
-- totalDiff: book over -102 (50.5% imp) vs model +113 (46.9% imp) → diff = -3.6pp (fade over)
UPDATE games SET
  awayModelSpread      = '+1.5',
  homeModelSpread      = '-1.5',
  modelAwaySpreadOdds  = '+105',
  modelHomeSpreadOdds  = '-105',
  modelAwayPLOdds      = '+105',
  modelHomePLOdds      = '-105',
  modelTotal           = '8.0',
  modelOverOdds        = '+113',
  modelUnderOdds       = '-113',
  modelAwayML          = '+241',
  modelHomeML          = '-241',
  modelAwayScore       = '3.17',
  modelHomeScore       = '4.85',
  modelOverRate        = '47.01',
  modelUnderRate       = '52.99',
  modelAwayWinPct      = '29.31',
  modelHomeWinPct      = '70.69',
  spreadDiff           = '4.3',
  totalDiff            = '-3.6',
  modelRunAt           = UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000,
  publishedModel       = 1
WHERE id = 2250008;

-- ── GAME 3: WSH @ CHC (id=2250009) ──────────────────────────────────────────
-- Model: WSH proj 3.05 runs, CHC proj 5.10 runs
-- WSH +1.5 run line: model says WSH covers 44.0% → WSH RL odds +127 / CHC RL odds -127
-- ML: WSH +292 / CHC -292
-- Total 7.0: Over -153 / Under +153
-- spreadDiff: book CHC -1.5 at +109 (47.8% imp) vs model -127 (56.0% imp) → diff = 8.2pp edge CHC
-- totalDiff: book over -108 (51.9% imp) vs model -153 (60.5% imp) → diff = 8.6pp edge OVER
UPDATE games SET
  awayModelSpread      = '+1.5',
  homeModelSpread      = '-1.5',
  modelAwaySpreadOdds  = '+127',
  modelHomeSpreadOdds  = '-127',
  modelAwayPLOdds      = '+127',
  modelHomePLOdds      = '-127',
  modelTotal           = '7.0',
  modelOverOdds        = '-153',
  modelUnderOdds       = '+153',
  modelAwayML          = '+292',
  modelHomeML          = '-292',
  modelAwayScore       = '3.05',
  modelHomeScore       = '5.10',
  modelOverRate        = '60.44',
  modelUnderRate       = '39.56',
  modelAwayWinPct      = '25.50',
  modelHomeWinPct      = '74.50',
  spreadDiff           = '8.2',
  totalDiff            = '8.6',
  modelRunAt           = UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000,
  publishedModel       = 1
WHERE id = 2250009;
